capability: Pure AI-client config resolution: app-config + optional per-tenant override precedence, model id -> display-name mapping, and provider filter/sort of a handed-in model list. No side effects (the spine builds the openai.OpenAI client and fetches the model list).

inputs.state.app_config: required dict of OPENROUTER_*/ANTHROPIC_*/CLAUDE_MODEL keys (may be empty; defaults apply)
inputs.state.tenant: optional per-tenant override (ai_model_id / ai_api_key / ai_base_url); non-empty values override app config
inputs.state.available_models: optional raw provider model list; filtered + provider-ordered, never fetched here

outputs.output.api_key_present: bool (key value is redacted, never echoed)
outputs.output.client_buildable: bool — api_key present AND base_url set
outputs.output.models: filtered+sorted model list (only when available_models given)
